description: Returns various properties for the given shot.
name: getShotInfo

ArraySized.desc: how much more shot has to live.
ArraySized.name: effectiveTimeToLive

ArraySized.desc: how long shot has to travel more to get fused (undebarrel grenade for example).
ArraySized.name: fuseDistanceLeft

ArraySized.desc: how long before shot fuse explodes (hand grenade for example) {{GVI|arma3|2.20|size= 0.75}} works on mines too.
ArraySized.name: timeToExplosion

ArraySized.desc: [[true]] if shot ammo was triggered with [[triggerAmmo]].
ArraySized.name: triggerIsForced

ArraySized.desc: [[true]] if the shot shown as tracer.
ArraySized.name: shownTracer

ArraySized.desc: [[true]] if the shot is considered in damage events.
ArraySized.name: isReal

ArraySized.desc: [[true]] if the shot contains submunition and it is triggered.
ArraySized.name: isSubmunitionTriggered

ArraySized.desc: [[true]] if the shot is already set for deletion but not yet removed from the scene.
ArraySized.name: isSetForDeletion

ArraySized.desc: the person who pulled the trigger.
ArraySized.name: shotInstigator

ret.desc: depends on the requested property, or [[Nothing]]

Item.desc: property index (see main syntax, for example 1 for fuseDistanceLeft)
Item.name: index
